description: Full Committee Hearing on February 26, 2026 at 4:30 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Mr. Mark R. Ditlevson to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Homeland Defense and Americas Security Affairs; and Honorable Brian D. Birdwell to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Sustainment
